title: Chove Chuva
collaboration: Technical direction for this video/aquatic installation by Cildo Meireles
description:
Arduino actuated electro-vans to create pseudo rain in an enclosed environment
                            / Creation of structure with different types of water dispensers to hang from the ceiling.
                            / Dedicated Video Player programmed in OpenFrameworks to display clips of fake rain filmed in a studio are projected on the 4 walls of an open top cube
                            / Kinect based presence tracking to link to the real rain in the space and the one video projected to the amount of the visitors in the cube
